SEQUENCE.COMMENT: ExecWorkflow_s - execute a single workflow or a tract of workflows - schedule this service on the scheduler, usually by tract
note that this service will ONLY look for workflows that are targeted to run their first step STEP01 on *this* cluster
this means that a scheduled tract of EVERY5MINS will only run 5-minute workflows where STEP01 is this specific cluster
this implies that multiple clusters could be running the EVERY5MINS (or other) tract
added the sFwTracetransid parameter to the z_getWorkflowByIID call

MAP.NAME: tract!=null
MAP.COMMENT: SELECT WF FROM TFW_WORKFLOW join TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS join TFW_WORKFLOW_STEP_ENV WHERE tract='%tract%' AND step='01' ENA='Y' AND CLUS_NAME='PRODAD2'

Values.value: SELECT DISTINCT TFW_WORKFLOW.WORKFLOW_IID,WORKFLOW_NAME FROM TFW_WORKFLOW JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS ON TFW_WORKFLOW.WORKFLOW_IID=TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS.WORKFLOW_IID JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW_STEP_ENV ON TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS.WORKFLOW_STEP_IID=TFW_WORKFLOW_STEP_ENV.WORKFLOW_STEP_IID WHERE tract='%tract%' AND (WORKFLOW_STEP='01' OR WORKFLOW_STEP='1') AND TFW_WORKFLOW.ENABLED='Y' AND CLUSTER_NAME='%clusterName%' ORDER BY WORKFLOW_NAME

MAP.NAME: workflowName!=null
MAP.COMMENT: SELECT WF FROM TFW_WORKFLOW WHERE WORKFLOW_NAME='%workflowName%' AND ENABLED='Y'

Values.value: SELECT WORKFLOW_IID,WORKFLOW_NAME FROM TFW_WORKFLOW WHERE WORKFLOW_NAME='%workflowName%' AND ENABLED='Y'

SELECT DISTINCT TFW_WORKFLOW.WORKFLOW_IID,WORKFLOW_NAME FROM TFW_WORKFLOW JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS ON TFW_WORKFLOW.WORKFLOW_IID=TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS.WORKFLOW_IID JOIN TFW_WORKFLOW_STEP_ENV ON TFW_WORKFLOW_STEPS.WORKFLOW_STEP_IID=TFW_WORKFLOW_STEP_ENV.WORKFLOW_STEP_IID WHERE tract='EVERY10MINS' AND (WORKFLOW_STEP='01' OR WORKFLOW_STEP='1') AND TFW_WORKFLOW.ENABLED='Y' ORDER BY WORKFLOW_NAME

MAP.COMMENT: drop the input so that these values dont 'linger' in other service pipelines

LOOP.COMMENT: EACH WORKFLOW - this loop must continue regardless of whether there were errors on any one workflow

MAP.COMMENT: Check if this workflow is already running

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this workflow is not running, so run it

MAP.COMMENT: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE (TRANSACTION_ID...) VALUES ('%WORKFLOW_IID%, date, RUNNING, ...)

Values.value: INSERT INTO TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE ( TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_START_UTC, STATUS, STATUS_MESSAGE, STATUS_DATE, WORKFLOW_NAME ) VALUES ( '%fw/dbOutput/results/WORKFLOW_IID%', SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'RUNNING', 'Workflow is running',to_char(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZR'), '%fw/dbOutput/results/WORKFLOW_NAME%' )

MAP.COMMENT: Note that the above record will only be deleted by ExecWorkflow_wretry
extract fw/stepService, fw/stepCluster, fw/stepEnvironment, fw/stepRetryCount, fw/StepRetryInterval from STEP01 of the workflow

BRANCH.COMMENT: spawn ExecWorkflow_wretry or broker it OBSOLETE

INVOKE.COMMENT: KEEP DISABLED - THIS IS ONLY HERE TO PROVIDE A REFERENCE TO THIS SERVICE

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: route to the correct cluster with an EXECWF call - OBSOLETE

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: this workflow is already running, so log a message and skip it
